samples.prompt_preview: Book cover illustration only — no text, no title, no author name, no lettering of any kind. No border, no frame, no ornamental elements. This circular medallion illustration MUST depict the following specific scene: Lucy Honeychurch stands on the balcony of the Pension Bertolini, gazing out over the Arno River as the sun sets, casting a golden glow over the city. The main character is Lucy Honeych
